title: Develop a security and compliance plan
summary: Build strategies around security and compliance and prepare for Exam AZ-400: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions.

sections.title: Develop a security and compliance plan
sections.summary: Build strategies around security and compliance and prepare for Exam AZ-400: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions.

lessons.title: Secure your identities by using Microsoft Entra ID
lessons.content_md:
Use Microsoft Entra ID to you secure your internal, external, and customer identities.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-ad/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Secure your identities by using Microsoft Entra ID

lessons.title: Manage users and groups in Microsoft Entra ID
lessons.content_md:
Manage users and groups in Microsoft Entra ID

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-users-and-groups-in-aad/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage users and groups in Microsoft Entra ID

lessons.title: Monitor and report on security events in Microsoft Entra ID
lessons.content_md:
Monitor Microsoft Entra security events with built-in reporting and monitoring capabilities to prevent unauthorized access and potential data loss.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-report-aad-security-events/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor and report on security events in Microsoft Entra ID

lessons.title: Maintain a secure repository by using GitHub best practices
lessons.content_md:
Learn best practices for building, hosting, and maintaining a secure repository on GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/maintain-secure-repository-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Maintain a secure repository by using GitHub best practices

lessons.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Learning from failure
lessons.content_md:
Learn about post-incident reviews, a practice necessary to help you sustainably achieve the appropriate level of reliability in your systems, services, and products.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/improve-reliability-failure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Learning from failure

lessons.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Incident response
lessons.content_md:
Learn the incident response fundamentals necessary to help you sustainably achieve the appropriate level of reliability in your systems, services, and products.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/improve-reliability-incidents/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Incident response

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Develop a security and compliance plan
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Develop a security and compliance plan**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
